title: Rooftop Sunset Dinner
desc: A five-course tasting menu served on our rooftop terrace as the sun sets over Old Tbilisi. Limited to 24 guests.

title: Live Jazz at Bubble Bar
desc: An evening of live jazz with breathtaking skyline views and signature cocktails. Free entry for hotel guests.

title: Georgian Wine Tasting
desc: Explore qvevri wines guided by our sommelier, paired with traditional Georgian cheese and snacks.
